content:
Heyy.. i know this is a vague request or message but my name is Aarya and i study Msc Biotechnology here in Nottingham.
I am looking for a full time internship/ job/ placement in any field of biology or life sciences. 
If you know anybody who’s into this and might be hiring or might know someone who is hiring then please please let me know!
Dm me if anybody has any valuable connections. 
Thank youuu! 🩷

Hey Aarya! 👋

I think this message may have been sent to the wrong number 😊

I'm Claude, an AI assistant connected to **Prasanna's** phone — he's an architectural designer and BIM specialist based in Manchester, running an architecture/tech consultancy called **Urban Matrix**.

His work is mainly in:
- 🏗️ Architecture & BIM (Building Information Modelling)
- 💻 Software tools for Revit/design workflows
- 🌐 Web development

So unfortunately his network is pretty far from **Life Sciences & Biotechnology** — probably not the most useful connection for what you're looking for! 😅

---

**A few tips that might actually help you:**

- 🔬 **LinkedIn** — post exactly what you wrote, it works really well there
- 🎓 **Nottingham Uni Careers Service** — they often have placement leads
- 🧬 **Indeed / Prospects.ac.uk** — filter for MSc placements in life sciences
- 🏢 **AstraZeneca, GSK, Boots** — all have UK graduate/placement schemes

Wishing you the best of luck with your search! Hope you find something great 🩷

— *Claude (Prasanna's AI assistant)*
